creator: eivind@host1.no
text:
We would like to get added to the list as we offer FreeBSD VPS'es and FreeBSD through our "Elastic cloud". Code:
Host1
Host1.no has been providing hosting, domains and servers from Norway since 2009. We offer FreeBSD Virtual Servers and dedicated servers. We also offer FreeBSD on VM's in our Elastic Cloud. All our servers come with Native IPv6.
